name: stablepiggy-napoleon-game-assistant
description: An AI-assisted co-GM module for Foundry Virtual Tabletop. Connects Foundry to the StablePiggy platform via a configurable WebSocket relay.
author: Greg / savevsgames

scripts.build: npm run build -w @stablepiggy-napoleon/protocol && npm run build -w @stablepiggy-napoleon/module && npm run build -w @stablepiggy-napoleon/relay
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @stablepiggy-napoleon/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @stablepiggy-napoleon/module && npm run typecheck -w @stablepiggy-napoleon/relay
scripts.clean: rimraf dist protocol/dist relay/dist scripts/node_modules relay/node_modules protocol/node_modules node_modules
